name: tinkercad
title: 3D Design in TinkerCAD
description: Design a 3D object by dragging shapes, resizing, combining, and exporting as STL for 3D printing.
prompt: Go to TinkerCAD, start a new design, create a simple phone stand using basic shapes, group them, and export as STL

steps.caption: Step 1: Open TinkerCAD - Autodesk's free platform for 3D learning and design
steps.description: Open TinkerCAD - Autodesk's free platform for 3D learning and design
steps.narration: Welcome, future architects. TinkerCAD is open, and free is still the best price in software.

steps.caption: Step 2: Open the Learning Center where beginner tutorials are available without login
steps.description: Open the Learning Center where beginner tutorials are available without login
steps.narration: Step two. Learning Center. The VIP lounge for knowledge with none of the create-an-account drama.

steps.caption: Step 3: Search for beginner 3D design tutorials using the search bar
steps.description: Search for beginner 3D design tutorials using the search bar
steps.narration: Search 3D design basics. Every keystroke is one more brick in the empire.

steps.caption: Step 4: Return to 3D Design tutorials for CAD-focused practice
steps.description: Return to 3D Design tutorials for CAD-focused practice
steps.narration: Back to CAD-focused practice. Professional games only. Focus, precision, geometry.

steps.caption: Step 5: Open a tutorial card to view guided learning content
steps.description: Open a tutorial card to view guided learning content
steps.narration: Open a tutorial card. Treasure chest vibes, except the prize is Z-axis wisdom.

steps.caption: Step 6: Scroll through the tutorial page to view lesson details and visuals
steps.description: Scroll through the tutorial page to view lesson details and visuals
steps.narration: Scroll through the visuals. Space stations, moon talk, enough inspiration to make NASA curious.

steps.caption: Step 7: Open the TinkerCAD gallery to explore community designs
steps.description: Open the TinkerCAD gallery to explore community designs
steps.narration: Gallery time. Nine million designs, all born while somebody was supposed to be doing taxes.

steps.caption: Step 8: Browse featured gallery designs for project inspiration
steps.description: Browse featured gallery designs for project inspiration
steps.narration: Browse the hits. Mushroom, Retro Diner, drawer caddy. Practicality and chaos in perfect harmony.

steps.caption: Step 9: Open a gallery design page to review details and references
steps.description: Open a gallery design page to review details and references
steps.narration: Open Mushroom by Demirarh. Purple, spotted, Staff Picked. Honestly, life goals.

steps.caption: Step 10: Tutorial complete - start learning TinkerCAD with no-login resources
steps.description: Tutorial complete - start learning TinkerCAD with no-login resources
steps.narration: Tutorial complete. You skipped the login, found the spark, and now Euclid expects greatness.
